name: qodeflow-downloadfile
title: Download File
description: Downloads a file from a specified URL and saves it to a local file path

input.name: url
input.description: The URL of the file to download

input.name: destination
input.description: The local file path or directory to save the downloaded file. If a directory is provided, the original filename from the URL will be used.

input.name: method
input.description: The HTTP method to use for the download request (default: GET)

input.name: headers
input.description: Custom HTTP headers to include in the request as an object/map

input.name: timeout
input.description: Timeout in seconds for the download operation

input.name: append
input.description: If true, appends to existing file. If false (default), overwrites existing file by deleting and recreating it.

output.name: error
output.description: Error message if the download failed

output.name: result
output.description: The result of the operation containing filePath and size in bytes
